name: Robin TX1 PosiProfile
comment:
Robin TX1 PosiProfile™: Preliminary physical and color measurements.
Bridging the divide between manual generic and fully automated fixtures, the TX1 PosiProfile™ combines both worlds into one revolutionary luminaire.

capabilities.comment: BO while PAN TILT moving: ON
BO while PAN TILT moving: OFF moving
Cue Playback - saving current DMX values
Preset Cue playback On - fixture plays the Cue automatically after every switching On
Preset Cue playback Off - fixture listens to DMX but only this channel and DMX values 142 - 143
Total fixture reset with pan tilt
Gobo indexing: Maximum speed and shortcut
Gobo indexing: Follow speed and follow direction
Gobo indexing: Maximum speed and follow direction
RoboSpot disabled except faders and PT
Colour mixing mode: CMY (DMX mode 1 and 2 only)
Colour mixing mode: RGB (DMX mode 1 and 2 only)
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
Crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix
Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow
Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow
Pulse closing from slow to fast
Pulse opening from fast to slow
Random strobe from slow to fast
Ramping from open to full position max
Ramping from open to full position min
Ramping from open to half position max
Ramping from open to half position min
Ramp from half position to full position max
Ramp from half position to full position min

capabilities.effectName: Random gobo selection by audio control
Auto random gobo selection from fast to slow
Random gobo selection by audio control
Auto random gobo selection from fast to slow
